description_long: This sculpture depicts a classical male figure standing upright on a rectangular plinth. The figure is partially draped, with a cloth wrapped around his lower body and left arm, leaving his muscular torso and right arm exposed. His right arm is raised, bent at the elbow, and his left hand rests on his hip, creating a dynamic and authoritative pose. The facial features are well-defined, with a beard and wavy hair, evoking the style of ancient Greco-Roman statuary. The surface of the sculpture appears to be made of a light-colored stone or marble, with subtle textural details visible in the drapery and anatomy. The base is simple and solid, providing stable support for the figure.
description: A classical male figure in stone, partially draped and standing on a rectangular plinth with one arm raised and the other resting on his hip.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the full figure, raised right arm, and detailed facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the draped cloth, and the depth of the raised arm.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view showing the back of the figure, the drapery, and the stance on the plinth.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the side profile, the draped cloth, and the figure's posture.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the background is neutral and does not provide contextual clues.
